specified in the Technical Specifications are not attained either in

the Contractor’s option, either

Facilities or any part thereof that are necessary to attain the   
Functional Guarantees at its cost and expense within a mutually   
agreed time and shall re quest the Employer to repeat the   
Guarantee Test, or

to meet the Functional Guarantees in accordance with the   
provisions in the SCC.
